subcodes.title: Suriy-i-Zubur
subcodes.first_line: The Beauty of the All-Merciful hath risen from the horizon of the Divine Good-Pleasure, veiled behind clouds of sorrow, and verily these clouds shall be lifted [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: جمال الرحمن عن افق الرضوان خلف سحاب الاحزان قد کان بالحق مشروقا و ان یرفع السحاب
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
